body:
## Summary
- Make shared AdBanner test-unit status copy platform-neutral in Swedish and English.
- Keep live-status copy live-only and update native/web source guards to require resolved test/live status for accessibility labels.
- Refresh the focused UI/content guards selected by the existing verifier pattern.

## Verification
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node --test --test-name-pattern "AdBanner|testStatus|liveStatus|testOnly|web preview|webbförhandsvisning" scripts/ui-effects.test.js scripts/monetization.test.js tests/content-ad-placement-route-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-ad-placement-route-parity`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `npx --no-install prettier --check lib/monetization/adCopy.ts scripts/monetization.test.js scripts/ui-effects.test.js tests/content-ad-placement-route-parity.test.js`
- `git diff --check -- lib/monetization/adCopy.ts scripts/monetization.test.js scripts/ui-effects.test.js tests/content-ad-placement-route-parity.test.js`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS="--v8-pool-size=1" npm run test:monetization`
title: [codex] make ad banner test copy platform-neutral
